_publications._publicationTitle: Ex vivo to in vivo model of malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumors for precision oncology

details: JH-2-023 PDX (established in PMID:33591953) used in ex vivo 3D microtissue platform study for MPNST precision oncology; microtissue quality not determined (ND) at 48 h post-encapsulation, precluding drug response testing in this study
